vendor bought
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2016 at 1:34 PM Rating: Decent
DeathTemplar
Sage
174 posts
Kartha Firespinner sells infinite supplies of Bat Wings.
▲ Page top
Freeport
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2011 at 10:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759693207
20 posts
In case anyone still needs this information: Lysa Truegreen in the West Free Port INT caster guild structure sells this component, approximately 1pp per stack. She is in the upper area of the guild.
▲ Page top
In POK
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2007 at 3:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591869496105
56 posts
Can get this from Darius Gandril (General Supplies) In POK.
▲ Page top
worth
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2006 at 7:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Bat Wings sell for 0 plat 0 gold 1 silver 0 copper when offered to Sateal Deirosap vendor in the bazaar by level 2 human monk with 143 cha. ... Current price is 2 plat in bazaar on druzzil server and unavailable on bertox server...
Sateal Deirosap will buy bat wings for 1 silver (?) from the same monk....
▲ Page top
Batwings and Baking
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2005 at 5:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593364787341
16 posts
Paineel is the easiest place I have found to hunt bat wings. They all stay in the newbie area and it is small enough that they can be easily seen. The bats here also have a high spawn rate. The part of the zone has bats, rats, and firebeetles. A good place to start your baking trade skill.
▲ Page top
Also in EC
QuoteReply
# May 16 2005 at 9:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761921594
23 posts
Katha Firespinner in East Commonlands also sells bat wings
▲ Page top
Abysmal Sea Vendor
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2004 at 2:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258155506
View User Forum
13 posts
Also sold by Duath Untez in the Abysmal Sea. Located near the bank at n70 p240 z97.
▲ Page top
PoK
QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 3:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257641809
41 posts
The loc for the person selling them in POK is 3.27,1486,124. It is a Dark Elf named Darius Gandril and he sells unlimited amounts of them. Oh Joy!! =)

Kunark ??
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 9:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246214987
2 posts
is there a way to buy/hunt for bat wings in Kunark ?

Toutoff "shaman wingless"
▲ Page top
RE: Kunark ??
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2003 at 3:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591796116629
View User Forum
25 posts
I was able to buy several stacks off an Iksar merchant in FoB. Pretty sure they weren't player hand ins.

There are 4 merchants near Cabilis, cant remember which one, but they are all not far from each other...
▲ Page top
locations
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2002 at 11:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255037618
231 posts
Any vendor that sells magical components has an infinite supply of these. A good example is the vendor outside and behind one of the banks in shadowhaven. He sells infinite fish scales, bat wings, tiny daggers, cat's eye agate, just to name a few. Once you do the merchant trader (whatever) quest in shadowhaven the merchants will all tolerate you. (Do it a few times and they love you!) Just think casters guilds, and if you find spell components, you might just find bat wings.
▲ Page top
Freeport, Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2002 at 9:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
I always pick up bat wings and fish scales at the Institute of Arcane Sciences in Freeport, because I sell water-breathing and levitate potions.

Though in the bazaar, I try to keep a stack of ten next to each potion, so that people understand they go together, but never fails, someone comes along and buys all the batwings up and leaves the potions behind. Too bad you can't set up "gift with purchase" as a trader.

I also mark these up to like 1gp each (they sell for like 1s2c) and they still go fast.
▲ Page top
wellity
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2002 at 5:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255467888
185 posts
I know that you CANNOT buy any bat wings from vendors in Greater Faydark <or all of Faydwer>, but go to EC to buy some... and nothing is wrong with killing bats... at high levels, any spell caster can nuke it and pick up the loot... as a druid, Ignite would so waste them <and anything roaming Greater Faydark> that I would be helping newbies in trouble... and shouting that you want to buy some bat wings isn't that much trouble... believe me, many people don't care for bat wings <especially non-casters>, so just ask for them in return for something <like a rusty weapon or some worthless loot to you, or if you are a caster, then buffs>... not too hard, but then again, I neve use levitate... =) shamans have levitate, too =) ask them for it =)
▲ Page top
RE: wellity
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2003 at 3:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
Edit: I guess they took the bat wings out of the Enchanter Guild in Felwithe...

Edited, Tue Mar 11 15:01:19 2003
▲ Page top
For Sale in Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2002 at 12:05 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591760931097
109 posts
Bat wings, in infinite quantity, are for sale in the Bazaar, too. The merchant is in the big hall at one end, his name is Dashelo Dalroshan.
▲ Page top
RE: For Sale in Bazaar
QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 2:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257641809
41 posts
I just checked now for the bat wings in infinite quantity and didn't see any at all. Kinda disapointed. =(
▲ Page top
East commons
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 3:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
One of the inns in east commons stocks bat wings for less than 2 sp each. Batwings for over 1pp per stack is just a matter of being somwhere that they are not sold, and finding someone with more money than time. Of course, If you are gonna do that, why kill bats when you can buy a stack for 4gp in East Commons.
▲ Page top
2pp?
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 7:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249678703
9 posts
the price of 2pp is usually for a stack not each... again as usual just my 2cp

Used for the Levitate spell
▲ Page top
Vendors
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 11:12 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I know you can purchase infinite bat wings in the caster guild in Freeport (enter, go straight ahead then left and up the stairs, first femaile mob on your right). I think they can also be purchased in East Commons or perhaps West Commons.

What I'd like to know is where to buy infinite bat wings on the same continent as Butcherblock, in order to perform the bat wing quest for Niola Impholder in the Felwithe Magician's guild.
